steps.title: Find the key signal
steps.content: The clause “we will never be able to answer it” signals that the question cannot be settled or resolved.

steps.title: Apply the signal to the choices
steps.content: Irresolvable means unable to be resolved, which matches the idea that the question can never be answered. The other choices either describe a contradiction, a necessity, or inevitability, none of which convey the sense of being unanswerable. That matches choice A — A is correct.
